'''Ansween''' was a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Imperial Remnant]] serving under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] as the commanding officer of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Right to Rule]]'' during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. At the [[Battle of Esfandia]], Ansween served as something of an aide-de-camp to Pellaeon, while at the same time helping direct and coordinate orders between Imperial and [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] forces.

{{Char-stub}}
